sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ζακχαῖος

- Transliteration: Zakchaios

- Phonetic: dzak-chah'-ee-yos

- Definition: Zacchaeus = "pure"

1. a chief tax collector

- Origin: of hebrew origin, cf H2140

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin (compare [H2140]); Zacchaeus an Israelite: - Zacchus.
